candidate_functional_effect: stage-bound ensemble of hallucination detectors whose firing pattern localizes the generation-step at which hallucination crystallized (post-error interval estimation)

results.judge_justification: Multi-stage cascade hallucination verification at ICLR 2026 is functionally close — different detectors fire at different verification stages; the pattern-reading-for-localization aspect is the only differentiator.
Six-category taxonomy is taxonomic not stage-ordered; partial overlap with stage-bound framing but not identical functional effect.
Temporal logic for fact-conflicting hallucinations — different axis (post-hoc fact check) vs candidate's runtime stage-localization.
Survey-level catalog; no specific functional match.
Discusses multi-stage frameworks but does not propose PEI-localization ensemble.
